chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S- 323 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 27.11.2025. M/s Ghulam Muhammad and Nasrullah Khaskheli, Advocates for applicant alongwith applicant. Ms. Safa Hisbani, A.P.G for State. One Haji Ghulam Rasool, grandfather of proposed accused present in person. = Heard and reserved. Learned A.P.G however, submits that she does not support the impugned order. JUDGE Tufail
